action_set_definitions.name: get_financial_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current available operational budget for forestry projects.

action_set_definitions.name: search_forest_plots
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of forest parcels based on species and location data.

action_set_definitions.name: simulate_harvest_impact
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates projected visual magnitude (VM), cost, and actual yield for a specific harvest plan on a specific plot.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_harvest_operation
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the timber harvest for a specific plot and records the resource extraction.

state_description.forest_plots: List of all manageable forest parcels containing tree data.
state_description.simulation_time: Current time context within the model.
